summary: FunnyRent 2.1 UI Cleanup - All 5 features tested and verified working correctly

minor.issue: 502 errors on some API calls during testing (transient network issues)

issues: Console warnings about missing DialogTitle/DialogDescription for accessibility - not blocking but should be addressed

passed_tests.test: Moderation modal has only ONE close button (X) in top right corner
passed_tests.result: SUCCESS - Default Shadcn button hidden via [&>button]:hidden class, custom close button at top-3 right-3 with z-20 is the only visible close button in modal

passed_tests.test: Carousel arrows don't overlap with close button
passed_tests.result: SUCCESS - Carousel buttons have z-10, close button has z-20, positioned at different locations (left-4/right-14 vs right-3)

passed_tests.test: 'Рекомендуем' section has Switch toggle instead of 'нажмите' text
passed_tests.result: SUCCESS - Switch component from Shadcn UI is present and functional, no 'нажмите' text found
SUCCESS - Switch toggles between checked/unchecked states, updates listing is_featured via API

passed_tests.test: Partner listing edit page - Seasonal pricing form is mobile responsive
passed_tests.result: SUCCESS - Date inputs arranged in 2 columns, multiplier and add button visible, fixed footer with save button on mobile

passed_tests.test: Redirect after save on partner listing edit page
passed_tests.result: SUCCESS - After clicking 'Сохранить', user is redirected to /partner/listings with toast message 'Объявление сохранено!'

critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent accessibility: Console warns about missing DialogTitle for screen readers - consider adding VisuallyHidden title
Supabase service key still hardcoded in frontend files - recommend moving to environment variables
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (4 pending listings in moderation, listing lst-696041b6 for edit page)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 2.1 UI Cleanup features verified: 1) Moderation modal has [&>button]:hidden on DialogContent to hide default Shadcn close button, custom close button at z-20 works correctly, 2) Switch component used for Рекомендуем toggle, 3) Seasonal pricing form mobile responsive with grid-cols-2 layout, 4) router.push('/partner/listings') after save works correctly. No issues found.
notes: Detailed X button analysis: 4 total lucide-x icons on page, only 2 visible (1 sidebar collapse, 1 modal close button)
Modal default Shadcn close button (X icon 3) has visible=False due to [&>button]:hidden CSS class
Mobile test performed at 390x844 viewport - all form elements accessible
Redirect test confirmed URL changes from /partner/listings/[id] to /partner/listings after save
